programs.title: Storage Wars
programs.desc: The buyers hit another auction in Huntington Beach, CA where Darrell tries to teach Brandon one of the toughest lessons in the storage locker game.

programs.title: Storage Wars
programs.desc: The buyers head to Norwalk searching for hidden gems. Darrell eyes a bigger prize, Mary comes prepared to prove herself, Ivy focuses on collectibles, and a risky plan could change everything.

programs.title: Hoarders
programs.desc: A family in crisis. Dolores is a cancer survivor and was a caregiver for her late mother. As an escape, Dolores turned to excessive shopping which triggered her hoarding disorder.
